title: Schizopsis fasciculata
taxonomy: Schizopsis fasciculata is a type of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The plant is further classified as a member of the class Magnoliopsida and the order Polygalales. Within the Polygalaceae family, Schizopsis fasciculata is placed in the tribe Polygaleae. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships and characteristics within the plant kingdom.
